PROJECT 06

Status: Transmission Received

This is the detailed mission brief and transmission log for Expedition 6. The visual data and source code are currently being decrypted by the mainframe.

As the project comes fully online, this section will contain the architecture details, challenges faced, and the technology stack utilized to bring this mission to life.
